notes.crop_feature_rule: We use existing observed semantic_feat/crop encoder cache instead of recomputing CLIP/DINO features in V20.
notes.training_input_disclosure: V20 uses frozen video-derived trace/object-dense teacher cache plus observed-only context features; no future frame/feature enters model input.

M128_H8.global_motion_proxy_source: observed median object anchor motion in same item
M128_H8.neighbor_context_source: observed object anchors/tracks in same V16 cache item
M128_H8.semantic_memory_source: observed semantic memory / prototype input only

M512_H8.global_motion_proxy_source: observed median object anchor motion in same item
M512_H8.neighbor_context_source: observed object anchors/tracks in same V16 cache item
M512_H8.semantic_memory_source: observed semantic memory / prototype input only
